mission.title: opentofu: feature: variabilize module source
mission.description: feature: variabilize module source . Requested by 25+ users.

steps.title: Check OpenTofu installation
steps.description:
Verify your OpenTofu version:
```bash
tofu version
```
This feature requires OpenTofu installed locally. Install via `brew install opentofu` or download from https://opentofu.org/docs/intro/install/.

steps.title: Understand the feature context
Apply the fix for feature: variabilize module source
steps.description:
Implements RFC #1042 [Static Evaluation](https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/blob/main/rfc/20240513-static-evaluation.md)
This is a work in progress that builds on top of my prototyping over the past 6 months.

Note: Input variable handing is a bit wonky as it's spread across a bunch of different packages.  This initial implementation will *not* prompt the user for missing variables and instead will print out an error.  A follow-up issue may be created to track the refactoring required to

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the feature is working as expected:
```bash
tofu version
tofu validate
tofu plan
```
Confirm that the feature described in "feature: variabilize module source " is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
⚠️ Note: This resolution was work-in-progress at the time of PR submission. Implements RFC #1042 [Static Evaluation](https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/blob/main/rfc/20240513-static-evaluation.md)
This is a work in progress that builds on top of my prototyping over the past 6 months.

Note: Input variable handing is a bit wonky as it's spread across a bunch of different packages.

prerequisites.description: OpenTofu CLI installed (brew install opentofu or download from opentofu.org). Terraform provider credentials as needed for the specific configuration.
